generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing real-time operational data (e.g., temperature, occupancy) to the DT for synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing real-time operational data (e.g., temperature, occupancy) to the DT for synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono protocol for IoT device communication and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance DittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive visualization and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance RevitTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Revit for Building Information Modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools for automated transformation of BIM models into DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model enriched with device metadata, sensor configurations, and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RevitTool, ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations for continuous data collection and synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for scenario testing and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization, visual comfort adjustment, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, NonVisualHealthInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization service to reduce consumption through data-driven decisions"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjustment of visual comfort through lighting and shading controls"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Management of non-visual health effects through environmental adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization using Unreal Engine 5 for real-time building monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for optimizing energy usage in building systems"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for adjusting lighting and visual comfort conditions"
]

instance NonVisualHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for managing non-visual health effects such as circadian rhythm"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data insights for current building operational status"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from simulated building scenarios for planning and analysis"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building systems for facility management"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC and lighting systems for energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualComfortAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control of window shades and lighting for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance NonVisualHealthAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustments to environmental factors to support non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CentralizedHub : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized hub managing modular service-oriented components."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators and controllers within Building Control Systems (BCS) that receive control signals from the DT to adjust physical building operations."
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators and controllers within Building Control Systems (BCS) that receive control signals from the DT to adjust physical building operations."
]

instance BlindsController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators and controllers within Building Control Systems (BCS) that receive control signals from the DT to adjust physical building operations."
]

instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building infrastructure, as demonstrated in a Living Lab case study, with unified virtual representations for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building operations throughout its life cycle."
    base:contains CentralizedHub, TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, HVACActuator, LightingController, BlindsController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals sent from the DT to actuators and controllers in Building Control Systems (BCS) via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange, though exact temporal resolution is not specified."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular service-oriented architecture with a central DT Framework facilitating bidirectional data exchange between physical assets and virtual services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases of building life cycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure synchronization and semantic coherence between physical and virtual representations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols for real-time data exchange, enabling MQTT-based communication for IoT devices and digital twin state management."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems via standardized extension points and protocols (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto), enabling interoperability with other AECO-specific systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards (e.g., IFC), Eclipse Hono and Ditto standards for IoT and digital twins, and standardized extension points for modular service integration."
]
